note: Coverage percentages are based on vendor_to_technique.jsonl edge table vs. known ATT&CK Enterprise v13 technique counts. Recompute with: python scripts/compute_coverage.py

initial-access.name: Initial Access
initial-access.primary_gap: Supply chain compromise (T1195), trusted relationship exploitation (T1199), hardware additions (T1200)

execution.name: Execution
execution.primary_gap: T1047 WMI, T1053 Scheduled Task, T1106 Native API, T1047 WMI lateral execution

persistence.name: Persistence
persistence.primary_gap: T1137 Office App Startup, T1176 Browser Extensions, T1197 BITS Jobs, T1505 Server Software Component

privilege-escalation.name: Privilege Escalation
privilege-escalation.primary_gap: T1134 Access Token Manipulation, T1484 Domain Policy Modification

defense-evasion.name: Defense Evasion
defense-evasion.primary_gap: T1218 LOLBAS, T1027 Obfuscation, T1574 Hijack Execution, T1070 Indicator Removal, T1553 Subvert Trust -- CRITICAL

credential-access.name: Credential Access
credential-access.primary_gap: T1552 Unsecured Credentials (score 33 -- highest in CTID), T1555 Password Stores, T1557 MITM for creds

discovery.name: Discovery
discovery.primary_gap: T1082 System Info, T1083 File/Dir, T1087 Account Discovery, T1018 Remote System Discovery -- CRITICAL

lateral-movement.name: Lateral Movement
lateral-movement.primary_gap: T1550 Use Alt Auth Material, T1563 Remote Session Hijacking, T1570 Lateral Tool Transfer

collection.name: Collection
collection.primary_gap: T1213 Info Repositories, T1530 Cloud Storage, T1560 Archive, T1056 Input Capture, T1074 Data Staged -- CRITICAL

command-and-control.name: Command and Control
command-and-control.primary_gap: T1001 Data Obfuscation, T1008 Fallback Channels, T1104 Multi-Stage Channels, T1219 Remote Access Software

exfiltration.name: Exfiltration
exfiltration.primary_gap: T1020 Automated Exfiltration, T1022 Data Encrypted, T1029 Scheduled Transfer, T1052 Physical Medium

impact.name: Impact
impact.primary_gap: T1485 Data Destruction, T1496 Resource Hijacking, T1498 Network DoS, T1499 Endpoint DoS, T1565 Data Manipulation
